imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Modern minimalist e-commerce logo with shopping bag icon in terracotta and sage green colors (logo.dim_200x200.png)
- Hero banner showing curated product display with warm natural lighting and earth tone background (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Sample product image: handcrafted ceramic bowl with natural texture (product-ceramic-bowl.dim_400x400.png)
- Sample product image: organic cotton tote bag in sage green (product-tote-bag.dim_400x400.png)
- Sample product image: minimalist wooden desk organizer (product-desk-organizer.dim_400x400.png)
- Sample product image: artisan scented candle in terracotta holder (product-candle.dim_400x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create a product catalog page displaying all available products in a grid layout with product images, names, prices, and 'Add to Cart' buttons
Implement a shopping cart system that allows users to add products, view cart contents, adjust quantities, and remove items
Create a product detail page showing full product information, larger image, and purchase options
Implement a checkout process that collects customer information and completes the order

Design a modern, professional e-commerce visual theme with a clean product-focused aesthetic using warm earth tones (terracotta, sage green, cream) with clear typography and generous whitespace that emphasizes product imagery and creates a trustworthy shopping experience
Render generated product images and logo as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated

new_feature_requests.summary: Create e-commerce website with product selling functionality
Create a backend data model for products with fields: id, name, description, price, image URL, and stock quantity
Implement backend functions to add, retrieve, update, and delete products
